rulings.Case Title: RONALD SVENDSGAARD et al VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B/P)AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Dismiss Action For Delay In Prosecution [C.C.P. §§ 583.410, 583.420(A)(2)(A)And(B); C.R.C. §§ 3.1340, 3.1342(A)]
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, December 15, 2011 in Department 503 at 1:30 p.m., Line 1. Defendants National Steel and Shipbuilding Co. and Foster Wheeler LLC¿s motion to dismiss action for delay in prosecution: hearing required. The hearing will be at 1:30pm in Department 503. Both sides must bring proposed orders to the hearing. A court reporter will not be provided by the court. If a court reporter is needed, the parties must meet and confer to agree on only one court reporter for any reported matter in this case. = (503/TLJ)
